project-settings.swide-toolchain: SoftConsole workspace has not been generated

core.core-desc:
8051 processor core with APB master interface.
Core8051s is a small, general-purpose processor. This processor is compatible with the instruction set of the 8051 microcontroller and preserves the three distinct software memory spaces so that it may be targeted by existing 8051 C compilers. To make it smaller and more flexible than the 8051, however, some of the microcontroller-specific features of the 8051 are not present.
A small subset of SFR registers are present but the peripherals are memory-mapped, rather than SFR-mapped. The peripherals appear only in external data memory space (on an APB bus) and not in internal memory space. The external ROM and external RAM share a common memory bus interface.
This core must be used with CoreAPB3 (not CoreAPB) for connecting to APB peripherals.

core-param.param-name: Include MUL, DIV and DA instructions:

core.core-desc: The CoreAPB3 component implements an APB3 (AMBA3 APB) fabric, which is backwards compatible with APB2 slave peripherals.There is one APB3 Master interface.

core-param.param-name: Number of address bits driven by master:
Position in slave address of upper 4 bits of master address:

core.core-desc: CoreGPIO provides APB access to 32 general purpose IOs, with configurable per bit enabling and interrupt generation.

memorysystem.title: Memory Map for top
memorysystem.description: The project contains the following subsystems:
